title: Use Task.Supervisor to tie worker lifetime to the test
prompt: Rewrite a test snippet that currently uses `Task.start/1` to spawn an unsupervised task to use `Task.Supervisor.async/2` under `MyApp.TaskSupervisor` so the task's lifetime is tied to the test process. Write the test in `test/my_app/ownership_test.exs`. Use `Task.Supervisor.async(MyApp.TaskSupervisor, fn -> ... end)` and `Task.await/1` to ensure the worker finishes before the test returns.
research_citation: "Make sure those tasks are terminated at the end of the test. This means you should start those tasks behind a Task.Supervisor" — Elixir Forum, josevalim
